_notes: Canonical session payload shape for the practice UI. Focus on builderKind, learningMode, targetItems, and item interaction metadata.
title: Work Study Vocabulary Builder Lesson

microIntro.whatItIs: A compact lesson that introduces usable vocabulary for work and study contexts.
microIntro.whenToUse: Use it when talking about goals, plans, deadlines, and communication.
microIntro.commonTrap: Knowing the phrase but not using it in a natural collocation.
modelExamples: We still need to meet the deadline this week.
I need to follow up with the team tomorrow.

targetItems.label: meet a deadline
targetItems.nextProofNeeded: Use the collocation naturally in one supported sentence.

items.prompt: Which sentence uses "meet a deadline" more naturally?

choiceOptions.text: We still need to meet the deadline this week.
We still need to catch the deadline this week.

items.followUpAcceptedAnswer: We still need to meet the deadline this week.
